## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/aaronmgn/stonepy/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The change uses a [Conventional Commit](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) subject.
- [ ] Generated files (models, resource bindings, `client.py`) were regenerated, not hand-edited.
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format --check .` pass.
- [ ] `uv run mypy` passes.
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior changed.
